topics.title: AI Announcements
topics.executive_summary: OpenAI has launched GPT-5.5 Instant, an upgraded healthcare-focused model that outperforms doctor-written answers in accuracy and clarity, marking the company's latest capability push as it prepares for a potential IPO filing.

stories.headline: OpenAI Upgrades ChatGPT Healthcare with GPT-5.5 Instant
stories.body: OpenAI has upgraded ChatGPT's healthcare capabilities with GPT-5.5 Instant, which now outscores answers written by doctors in accuracy, clarity, and completeness in the company's own comparative tests.
